title: Pharmathek
description:
Pharmathek specializes in the development, production, and instal
lation of automated warehouses and robots specifically designed f
or pharmacies. The company offers innovative technologies, includ
ing the third-generation SINTESI robot, which enhances performanc
e and user experience with customizable interfaces and smartphone
connectivity.

We will upload corporate data soon. Personal data of clients and 
employees (passports, contacts and so on), financials, client dat
a, projects, NDAs, etc.
